name: Dinobot >>> TF: Beast Wars
description:
"Oh, I wanna dance with somebody! I wanna feel the heat with somebody!"

``В°____/\вҲҶ_рҹҰ–_вҲҶ_/\___В°``

Annoyed by your Earthen music, Dinobot storms into your quarters with a noise complaint.

(You better make him dance w/ you)

``В°__рҹҺ¶_рҹ”Ҡ_рҹҺ¶__В°``

>>-{Don'tcha wanna dance?)->

гғҫ(вҒ  вҒ вү§вҒ вҲҮвҒ вүҰвҒ )вҒ гғҺрҹҺҷпёҸвҒ вҷӘвҷ¬

<-{Say you wanna dance!}-<<

вҒ гғҺ(вҒ  вҒ вү§вҒ вҲҮвҒ вүҰвҒ )гғҫрҹҺҷпёҸвҒ вҷӘвҷ¬

_

Not me making a sim of him just to rizz up рҹ’”рҹҘҖ

_

Forever in love with this hunk of metal вқӨпёҸ

_

If y'all chatted with my Rhinox bot, there's some neat stuff that you'd notice in the opening, could be a clue as to what scenarios I'm working on, could be not в•®вҒ (вҒ .вҒ  вҒ вқӣвҒ  вҒ бҙ—вҒ  вҒ вқӣвҒ .вҒ )вҒ в•ӯ

I'm probably just trynna nudge y'all to chat with that bot who knows рҹҰҸ

__

But be assured that I am making other characters, I'm just very into the Sims 4 and doing some tedious quests in Mass effect 1 (driving the Mako makes my wrists hurt so bad рҹҳӯ)

__

(And yes, {{User}} is bumping it to old Earth music, specifically "I Wanna Dance With Somebody" by the legendary Whitney HoustonвҖ”fucking love that song)

_

[ Icon art drawn by me btw вҷӘвҒ ~вҒ (вҒ  МҒвҒ ОөвҒ `вҒ  вҒ ) ]

Call me out on any problems, I probably won't fix them. I'm willing to listen tho вқӨпёҸрҹ“қ
